query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'reactivation_contacts' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
